creator: phil@freebsd.org
text:
I don't have this OID (debug.witness.fullgraph) but have munged your test problem to read a file an entire file and spew it as a single tag.  But I've not found the issue you are seeing.  I've tried sizes <1mb and it works fine.  I've guessing it might be related to the specific content.  Could you please send your "sysctl debug.witness.fullgraph" output (uuencoded, just to be safe) to phil@?

Thanks,
 Phil

P.s: My test driver is at:

   https://gist.github.com/philshafer/95fc4ab814091529fc0a132a49130d90
